summary: The page renders all 11 sections in correct order with strong visual fidelity (91.4% pixel match) and proper EDS signature classes (eds-header, eds-announcement-banner, eds-hero-banner, eds-card, eds-video, eds-isi, eds-footer). Main deductions are for missing header/video SVG icons rendered as CSS pseudo-elements, the logo positioned at left edge instead of the artboard column, and several font-size/color mismatches in the long RTF/ISI text block.

issues.actual: Top nav links use CSS-drawn .ep-ext pseudo-element borders instead of the manifest SVGs
issues.fix: Reference the three export SVG assets as sized 12x12 next to each top link

issues.actual: Only the poster image is rendered; no play button, '01:00' label, or control SVGs present
issues.fix: Add the video control SVG assets and the '01:00' timestamp text over the poster

issues.actual: Long RTF paragraphs/list items set to 18.3px
issues.fix: Set ep-longrtf p/li font-size to 15px to match spec

issues.actual: rgb(34,34,34) / rgb(33,37,41) via var(--gs-tertiary_90) and Bootstrap defaults

issues.expected: Logo at x≈155px @1366 artboard (aligned to content column)
issues.actual: Logo rendered at x=20px (flush to left padding)
issues.fix: Align the logo within the 1200px content column instead of full-width container edge
Left-align the footer logo to the content column per design
Align card-02 grid to the proper content column offsets

issues.actual: font-weight 400 applied to ep-l-h span in some places
issues.fix: Ensure the bold heading line uses font-weight 700

issues.expected: Design ends section 02 sub-line at 'Talk to your' (likely truncated spec) with exact wording
issues.actual: Added text 'doctor about treatment today.' not verified against full source
issues.fix: Verify extended copy matches the authoritative source text exactly
